textByHash.0503eaff7de45538a592b1ec982009f2fcb8455f: Our great library filled with millennia of knowledge; runic, magical and religious, are but small findings compared to the power of the Dark Altar.
textByHash.08af539b265324c9229e3287defc158daa6d023f: Our library is something to behond, but the millennia of knowledge found there; runic, magical and religious, are but small findings compared to the power of the Dark Altar.
textByHash.11c7e9f5ea70b31f00d92bbe9361ea7eccf915d9: Very well, then. The rest of the world could certainly do with learning about our great library.
textByHash.1747f4a55097d60bd3f3cfd43896ff7187b9e7cc: house; the knowledge of Blood and Soul runecrafting.
textByHash.17f0898765a641cea60fdc58b7e7c96869f3c70a: You're welcome. Spread the word of this great house with the new knowledge you have gained, and perhaps be more careful with how you hold your scroll in the future...
textByHash.20b0bd1685e5a950bbafa5d7d8d7a327ad46ef44: Those seeking favour within our household start with a particularly labour intensive job.
textByHash.21d0b0af7ad136c9f8de02e660bb083668880815: This house holds knowledge many would deem unsafe to share. Why should I be so trusting to you?
textByHash.3214d9f264c9cd752b1481f7a18791949c6accbb: You're not a very good journalist if you forget your equipment. Very well, then. I'll await your return.
textByHash.4180c61348a8f304fe30a79c7b5cd1c50d82db8f: You're welcome. Spread the word of this great city with the new knowledge you have gained, and perhaps be more careful with how you hold your scroll in the future...
textByHash.5239d28054f13e2886ee50023ea3ccc9f9c6a844: The Arceuus house is filled with literary and magical scholars. Lead by the great Trobin Arceuus, as a leader, he assists in pushing the limit of our knowledge surrounding magical abilities, religion and the crafting of
textByHash.581540cb0664c5f5f3537e1ddd4f38561fd55244: Through its power, we have great knowledge on life and death. This knowledge could be yours as well.
textByHash.662737c2cd46c78101730c0adb623015e418496e: Reanimation of life... that's where our studies currently lie. This knowledge could be yours.
textByHash.8b1e91e192287f210edca18dc5d5156882efd678: This city holds knowledge many would deem unsafe to share. Why should I be so trusting to you?
textByHash.8e04719dbd8da0e039c5763c2c80c748d6888514: Or, in terms that you may understand more easily, this place is a shop that sells magic stuff for money. Though I also trade in various other items.
textByHash.9abf0505e4984e5a0d9fbccedbe3bc72cc2c690e: What do you require, traveller? I deal in many things.
textByHash.9be7cdfdef58036b358dd217747583a48266a68b: Very well. As mentioned, rewards on offer within our city are priceless. The sharing of our magical research is but child's play compared to the knowledge of Blood and Soul runecrafting.
textByHash.a2307b16dff0f4cd3721c237da6de0e0d89db939: runic energy. He cares not for petty control, focusing instead on the expansion of knowledge within Great Kourend.
textByHash.a8442fef918d5f27412bcde5b8c72c6c52d8cee8: He cares not for petty control, focusing instead on the expansion of knowledge within Great Kourend.
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.be6275c5fa66c98d8ca1f6aa6c09ebdc0596a790: Someone willing to share knowledge of our great house to many others?
textByHash.be8d8dd2b4813a5e541ff96054c1369217bd84a2: Someone willing to share knowledge of our great city to many others?
textByHash.c087fb8ff8f1426b33a06db26ff4b2a34c8786f2: Our library, as grand as it is, still requires maintenance... constantly.
textByHash.d6c7c015fba9aa6db6f40ca617d9a19b3b00bad1: Arceuus is filled with literary and magical scholars. Lead by the great Trobin Arceuus. As a leader, he assists in pushing the limit of our knowledge surrounding magical abilities, souls and the crafting of runic energy.
textByHash.db2e7b5c526822e950b5b07e8bcfb635efa0d8cd: Very well. As mentioned, rewards for loyalty within our household are priceless. The sharing of our research surrounding re-animation and magic is but child's play to the knowledge we share to the most loyal of our
textByHash.f12f04395ba5c5ef13b1887a128e5165a1d2a5a2: This place is a union of the mystical and the mundane, where the magical realm reaches out to touch the humdrum world of commerce.
